title: starfire-personal-v1
subtitle: Personal conversations, memories, and code for fine-tuning a personal AI agent
description:
# Starfire Personal AI Training Data

Instruction-tuning dataset for fine-tuning a personal AI agent (Starfire) on Bonsai-8B Q1_0_g128.

**1,758 examples** — ChatGPT conversations, git commits, Starfire memories, Perplexity research discussions.

Format: JSONL with message arrays (system/user/assistant).

License: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0
